query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS progression_pathways (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  pillar ENUM('LAND', 'AIR', 'WATER', 'SELF') NOT NULL,
  stage_1_title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT 'W-2 Employee',
  stage_1_duration_months INT DEFAULT 24,
  stage_2_title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Contractor',
  stage_2_duration_months INT DEFAULT 12,
  stage_3_title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Business Owner',
  stage_3_requirements TEXT,
  stage_4_title VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT 'House Member' COMMENT 'Full Wealth Integration',
  stage_4_requirements TEXT,
  skills_required TEXT,
  certifications_required TEXT,
  estimated_timeline_months INT DEFAULT 48,
  success_metrics TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS progression_pathways (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  pillar ENUM('LAND', 'AIR', 'WATER', 'SELF') NOT NULL,
  stage_1_title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT 'W-2 Employee',
  stage_1_duration_months INT DEFAULT 24,
  stage_2_title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Contractor',
  stage_2_duration_months INT DEFAULT 12,
  stage_3_title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Business Owner',
  stage_3_requirements TEXT,
  stage_4_title VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT 'House Member' COMMENT 'Full Wealth Integration',
  stage_4_requirements TEXT,
  skills_required TEXT,
  certifications_required TEXT,
  estimated_timeline_months INT DEFAULT 48,
  success_metrics TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
